title: limonium duriusculum subsp. thiniense
intro: Limonium duriusculum subsp. thiniense is a subspecies of the Limonium duriusculum plant, a type of salt-tolerant succulent that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Limonium duriusculum subsp. thiniense include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as an antispasmodic to alleviate muscle cramps and spasms. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
